metadata.description: Resource ID of the Log Analytics workspace containing FinOpsInventory_CL

variables.kqlSubscriptionSummary: FinOpsInventory_CL | where scope == 'subscription' or resourceGroup == '_subscription_rollup' | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) | project SubscriptionBudget=technicalBudget, AmortizedMTD=amortizedMTD, ForecastEOM=forecastEOM, BudgetUsed=actualPct, ForecastPct=forecastPct, Status=complianceStatus, TotalRGs=totalResourceGroups, LastEvaluated=lastEvaluated
variables.kqlCompliancePie: FinOpsInventory_CL | where resourceGroup != '_subscription_rollup' and isnotempty(resourceGroup) | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by resourceGroup | summarize Count=count() by complianceStatus | order by Count desc
variables.kqlInventoryGrid: FinOpsInventory_CL | where resourceGroup != '_subscription_rollup' and isnotempty(resourceGroup) | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by resourceGroup | project ResourceGroup=resourceGroup, Budget=technicalBudget, SpendMTD=amortizedMTD, Forecast=forecastEOM, UsedPct=actualPct, ForecastPct=forecastPct, Status=complianceStatus, Tier=spendTier, Owner=ownerEmail, CostCenter=costCenter, LastEvaluated=lastEvaluated | order by UsedPct desc
variables.kqlTopSpenders: FinOpsInventory_CL | where resourceGroup != '_subscription_rollup' and isnotempty(resourceGroup) | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by resourceGroup | top 10 by amortizedMTD desc | project ResourceGroup=resourceGroup, SpendMTD=amortizedMTD, Budget=technicalBudget, UsedPct=actualPct, Status=complianceStatus
variables.kqlVarianceReport: FinOpsInventory_CL | where resourceGroup != '_subscription_rollup' and isnotempty(resourceGroup) | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by resourceGroup | where financeBudget > 0 or technicalBudget > 0 | extend FinanceVariance = amortizedMTD - financeBudget, TechVariance = amortizedMTD - technicalBudget | project ResourceGroup=resourceGroup, FinanceBudget=financeBudget, TechBudget=technicalBudget, SpendMTD=amortizedMTD, FinanceVariance, TechVariance, Status=complianceStatus | order by FinanceVariance desc
variables.kqlBurnRate: FinOpsInventory_CL | where resourceGroup != '_subscription_rollup' and isnotempty(resourceGroup) | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by resourceGroup | where burnRateDaily > 0 | project ResourceGroup=resourceGroup, DailyBurn=burnRateDaily, MonthlyProjection=burnRateDaily*30, Budget=technicalBudget, DaysToExhaust=iff(burnRateDaily>0, (technicalBudget-amortizedMTD)/burnRateDaily, 999.0) | order by DaysToExhaust asc

properties.serializedData: [concat('{"version":"Notebook/1.0","items":[{"type":1,"content":{"json":"# FinOps Budget Compliance Dashboard\n\nReal-time amortized cost tracking powered by Log Analytics (FinOpsInventory_CL). Data refreshes after each daily evaluation (06:00 UTC) and on-demand triggers."},"name":"title"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"', variables('kqlSubscriptionSummary'), '","size":4,"title":"Subscription Summary","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","crossComponentResources":["', parameters('workspaceResourceId'), '"],"visualization":"tiles","tileSettings":{"showBorder":true}},"name":"subscription-summary"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"', variables('kqlCompliancePie'), '","size":2,"title":"Compliance Status Distribution","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","crossComponentResources":["', parameters('workspaceResourceId'), '"],"visualization":"piechart"},"name":"compliance-pie"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"', variables('kqlTopSpenders'), '","size":0,"title":"Top 10 Spenders (by Amortized MTD)","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","crossComponentResources":["', parameters('workspaceResourceId'), '"],"visualization":"barchart"},"name":"top-spenders"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"', variables('kqlInventoryGrid'), '","size":0,"title":"Full Inventory - All Resource Groups","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","crossComponentResources":["', parameters('workspaceResourceId'), '"],"visualization":"table","gridSettings":{"sortBy":[{"itemKey":"UsedPct","sortOrder":2}]}},"name":"inventory-grid"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"', variables('kqlVarianceReport'), '","size":0,"title":"Finance vs Technical Budget Variance","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","crossComponentResources":["', parameters('workspaceResourceId'), '"],"visualization":"table"},"name":"variance-report"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"', variables('kqlBurnRate'), '","size":0,"title":"Burn Rate Analysis - Days to Budget Exhaustion","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","crossComponentResources":["', parameters('workspaceResourceId'), '"],"visualization":"table","gridSettings":{"sortBy":[{"itemKey":"DaysToExhaust","sortOrder":1}]}},"name":"burn-rate"}],"isLocked":false}')]
